race.name: Snow Farm Challenge
race.tagline: Forty-two kilometers on New Zealand's premier Nordic trails — where the Southern Alps' tussock high country and Cardrona valley views reward every stride.

vitals.aid_stations: Feed stations at Snow Farm lodge and on course

climate.description: August is mid-winter in New Zealand. Snow Farm at 1,600m in the Cardrona valley receives reliable snowfall from the Southern Alps weather patterns. Temperatures typically -5°C to 5°C. The maritime influence means snow can be variable — freeze-thaw cycles are common. NZ's Nordic season is short but can deliver excellent conditions.
challenges: Maritime snow — freeze-thaw cycles create variable conditions
Strong nor'west winds can impact the exposed high-country course
Limited infrastructure — Snow Farm is a remote high-country operation

course.primary: A 42km race on the Snow Farm's extensive trail system at 1,600m in the Cardrona Valley. The course traverses high-country tussock grassland and sheltered gullies with panoramic views of the Southern Alps, Cardrona Valley, and Lake Wanaka in the distance. Snow Farm is the Southern Hemisphere's only dedicated Nordic ski area with over 55km of groomed trails.
course.surface: Machine-groomed trails at a dedicated Nordic centre; tussock high country
course.grooming: Good grooming at the Southern Hemisphere's only dedicated Nordic facility
features: Southern Hemisphere's only dedicated Nordic ski area
Panoramic Southern Alps and Lake Wanaka views
Used by international teams for off-season training camps

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum scenery for the extraordinary Southern Alps high-country landscape. Strong grooming and organization for the Southern Hemisphere's only dedicated Nordic facility. International teams use Snow Farm for off-season training, adding credibility. Small field and moderate snow reliability in the maritime climate are limiting factors.

history.summary: The Snow Farm Challenge is held at Snow Farm, the Southern Hemisphere's only dedicated Nordic ski area, located at 1,600m in the Cardrona Valley near Wanaka, New Zealand. Snow Farm was developed in the 1990s and has become an important off-season training venue for international Nordic teams from Europe and North America. The Challenge is the centerpiece event of New Zealand's small but passionate Nordic skiing community.
notable_facts: Held at the Southern Hemisphere's only dedicated Nordic ski area
Snow Farm has 55+ km of groomed trails at 1,600m
Used by international teams for off-season training
Cardrona Valley is part of the Wanaka/Queenstown tourism region
New Zealand's Nordic skiing community is small but dedicated
Southern Alps provide a dramatic mountain backdrop

youtube_data.search_query: Snow Farm Challenge cross country ski race Snow Farm / Cardrona

videos.title: #SkiWanaka 2017
videos.description:
www.ski-wanaka.nz

Located in the spectacular Southern Alps of New Zealand, Wanaka is the perfect base to enjoy the best skiing in New Zealand. 

Three diverse ski areas - Cardrona, Treble Cone and Snow Farm all located within a 40-minute drive from the town centre, as well as access to the largest heli - ski terrain in the Southern Hemisphere.

With parks‚ pipes‚ wide open runs, challenging steeps, powder stashes and New Zealand's only cross country ski area, Wanaka is the ultimate snow experience for first-timer skiers through to seasoned pros.

Visit https://www.lakewanaka.co.nz/ for more details

videos.title: The Making of "Meanwhile in New Zealand... Snow Fight"
videos.description:
Meanwhile in New Zealand, skiers and snowboarders have decided to settle the score the old fashioned way. With the most epic snow fight you’ll ever see…

Here we take you behind the scenes to meet the teams and the crew who helped to make it all happen. Featuring Jossi Wells and the guys from Diaries DownUnder. Filmed at Snow Farm, near Cardrona and Wanaka on the South Island of New Zealand.

videos.title: Skier experiences the Merino Muster 2022 in New Zealand (Quad biking, fishing, ice bar...)
videos.description:
Here comes part 2 of you my Vlog about my journey to New Zealand's Merino Muster. What an awesome country! So many possibilities, so great landscapes, so nice skiing. 
❄️ Follow me to the Snow Farm, the skiing resort in Cardrona, where the Merino Muster is taking place.
- https://www.merinomuster.com/
 🏍  Then we add some horse powers and check out New Zealand's mountains with the Quad bike. 
- https://thecardrona.co.nz/
🎣 As a pre race dinner, I caught my own salmon at Hook Wanaka. 
- https://hookwanaka.nz/
🧊 And in the end we check out Queenstown's nightlife at the Queenstown Ice Bar. 
- https://queenstownicebar.com/


Promo: 
👕 Also check out the Worldloppet Clothing by Moomoo: https://www.worldloppet.com/shop/

😎 Northug Eyewear & Sportswear: 
https://northug.com/

videos.title: Heavy snow, warm temps force Luminary Loppet, Lake Harriet Art Shanties to adjust plans
videos.description: Our recent swing in weather has created challenges for outdoor events. From ice melting, to uneven freezing on lakes, organizers are making adjustments. The changes may impact your plans.

videos.title: The Snowbine Harvester Part 1 | Top Gear | BBC
videos.description:
Jeremy, Richard and James set out to end the chaos and misery that snow brings to Britain every year by using a combine harvester, some basic engineering skills and a quick trip to Norway!

Subscribe for more awesome Top Gear videos: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=Topgear

Top Gear YouTube channel: http://www.youtube.com/topgear
TopGear.com website: http://www.topgear.com

Top Gear Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/topgear
Top Gear Twitter: http://twitter.com/BBC_topgear

This is a commercial channel from BBC Studios. Service & Feedback https://www.bbcstudios.com/contact/contact-us/

quotes.text: Two days before race day checking out the tracks and honestly I'm more like checking out the views it's so beautiful up here. Another extraordinary place for ski marathon.
